toolsets.description: Comma-separated toolset names to enable on startup (e.g. 'camera,bindbindEntity,bindLayer'). If not set, all toolsets are enabled by default.

locale.description: Tool description language. 'en' for English (default), 'zh-CN' for Chinese.

transport.description: MCP transport mode. 'stdio' for standard I/O (default), 'http' for Streamable HTTP.

port.description: HTTP port for Streamable HTTP transport mode. Default: WS_PORT + 100 (typically 9200).
